expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?

{"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["Documents Summary"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"Reader Specialist Response (Markdown + PDF)"},"children":["SUMMARY OF tanzaniamemories.md (Trip Planning Notes)

This is Vasilis's planning document for a fully booked 18-day international trip in August 2026 with companion Athina Mari, covering Cairo, northern Tanzania safari circuit, Zanzibar, and Dar es Salaam (Aug 3–20). All logistics are confirmed; no gaps remain.

CONCRETE FACTS — NAMES, DATES, PLACES, CONTACTS, COSTS

TRAVELERS:
- Vasileios Kefallinos
- Athina Mari

FULL FLIGHT ITINERARY (total ~€2,707):
- Aug 3: ATH→CAI, Aegean A3932, 06:55–08:50, ref ZZJQUU
- Aug 4: CAI→DAR, EgyptAir, 22:40–04:20+1
- Aug 5: DAR→ARK, Precision Air TC144, 10:50–12:00
- Aug 11: ARK→ZNZ, Precision Air TC145, 12:40–13:40
- Aug 19: DAR→CAI, EgyptAir, 05:20–11:05
- Aug 20: CAI→ATH, Aegean A3935, 19:55–22:00, ref ZZL22S

ACCOMMODATIONS (confirmed):
- Eileen Hotel, Cairo — Aug 3–5, $102 total; address: 21 Youssef El-Gendy St, Abdeen, Downtown Cairo (near Tahrir Square); phone +20 15 56434043, info@eileenhotel.com
- Serengeti Villa, Arusha — Aug 5–7, $62 total; phone +255 757 757 928
- Safari (Suricata Safaris): Twiga Camp Site (Tarangire, full board) → Twiga Camp Site (Lake Manyara, full board) → Jevas Hotel (Ngorongoro, half board) — Aug 7–9
- Kutoka Lodge, Arusha — Aug 9–11, $96 total
- Treasures of Zanzibar House, Stone Town — Aug 11–13, $100 total
- Ayla Beach House, Kiwengwa (Zanzibar) — Aug 13–17, $304 total
- Sunny Shore B&B, Dar es Salaam — Aug 17–19, $200 total
- Ramses Hilton, Cairo — Aug 19–20 (1 night), $87 total
- Total lodging spend (excluding safari package): $951

SAFARI (Suricata Safaris Ltd):
- 3-day group camping safari, Aug 7–9
- Contact: Richard, +255 763 222 293, info@suricatasafaris.com
- Cost: $1,200 total for 2 pax
  - $240 deposit paid (20%)
  - $960 balance due on arrival, cash (post-2009 USD notes) preferred
  - Online payment via Pesapal: payments.pesapal.com/suricatasafaris (+5% surcharge)

DINING:
- The Rock Restaurant, Zanzibar — Aug 15, 18:00–20:00 sitting, 2 adults, 2x Tropical Passion Fruit Cheesecake included, fully paid $46
  - Outdoor seating requested for sunset/star views
  - Contact: +255 776 591 360 / +255 763 070 658, booking@therockrestaurantzanzibar.com

VISA & INSURANCE REQUIREMENTS:
- Tanzania e-visa: mandatory online at visa.immigration.go.tz, $50/person (total $100 for 2). Visa-on-arrival no longer available as of Jan 2025.
- Egypt e-visa: multiple-entry, $65/person (total $130 for 2). Both travelers apply separately; mandatory printed copy required.
- Zanzibar mandatory travel insurance: Zanzibar Insurance Corporation (ZIC), $44/person (total $88 for 2).

PARK FEES & TARIFFS (from costs sheet, 2 pax):
- Ngorongoro Conservation Area entry permit: 2 x $70.80 = $141.60
- Ngorongoro crater service fee: 2 x $70.80 = $141.60
- Ngorongoro crater vehicle descent fee: $295.00 (per vehicle/trip, non-EA)
- Tarangire NP entrance: 2 x $59.00 = $118.00 (peak season)
- Lake Manyara NP entrance: 2 x $59.00 = $118.00 (peak season)

TRANSPORT (non-flight):
- Zanzibar local driving permit: ~$15 per driver, valid up to 3 months (requires IDP + license photo 24h before arrival; police checkpoints frequent)

TOTAL TRIP COST (USD, excluding flights which are in EUR): $3,344.20
Flights separately: ~€2,707

CAIRO SIGHTSEEING PLANS:
- Stopover 1 (Aug 3–4): Grand Egyptian Museum, Pyramids of Giza
- Stopover 2 (Aug 19–20): Islamic Cairo, the Citadel, Khan el-Khalili bazaar, Coptic Cairo (taxi needed Citadel↔Coptic Cairo)

DAR ES SALAAM:
- Interest in Kivukoni Fish Market, Kariakoo Market, National Museum, Coco Beach, Bongoyo Island. Arriving by ferry from Zanzibar.

OTHER NOTES:
- Precision Air (TC144/TC145) favors soft bags for luggage.
- Ngorongoro nights are cold — warm layers needed.
- North coast (Nungwi area) best for Zanzibar swimming.
- August is peak safari season (Great Wildebeest Migration corridor).
- Safari clothing: Decathlon (Forclaz trekking line) recommended; DEET insect repellent essential.

SUMMARY OF trip-costs.xlsx (Budget Spreadsheet)

Sheet "legs" — Leg-by-leg breakdown:
- Cairo (arrival stopover): Aug 3-5, 2 nights, Eileen Hotel, $102
- Arusha (pre-safari): Aug 5-7, 2 nights, Serengeti Villa, $62
- Safari circuit (Tarangire/Lake Manyara/Ngorongoro): Aug 7-9, 2 nights, Suricata Safaris package (Twiga camps + Jevas Hotel), $1,200
- Arusha (post-safari): Aug 9-11, 2 nights, Kutoka Lodge, $96
- Zanzibar Stone Town: Aug 11-13, 2 nights, Treasures of Zanzibar House, $100
- Zanzibar beach (Kiwengwa): Aug 13-17, 4 nights, Ayla Beach House, $304
- Dar es Salaam: Aug 17-19, 2 nights, Sunny Shore B&B, $200
- Cairo (departure stopover): Aug 19-20, 1 night, Ramses Hilton, $87
- Total nights: 17

Sheet "costs" — All line items (flights in EUR, everything else USD):
- Flights (6 legs, 2 travelers): €2,707
- Suricata Safaris 3-day group camping, 2 pax: $1,200 (deposit $240 paid; $960 balance due in cash, post-2009 USD notes)
- The Rock Restaurant dinner (Aug 15, paid): $46
- Zanzibar local driving permit: $15
- Tanzania e-visa (2 x $50): $100
- Egypt e-visa multiple-entry (2 x $65): $130
- Zanzibar mandatory travel insurance ZIC (2 x $44): $88
- Ngorongoro Conservation Area entry permit (2 x $70.80): $141.60
- Ngorongoro crater service fee (2 x $70.80): $141.60
- Ngorongoro crater vehicle descent fee: $295.00
- Tarangire NP entrance (2 x $59, peak season): $118.00
- Lake Manyara NP entrance (2 x $59, peak season): $118.00
- Lodging total (from legs sheet, excl. safari package): $951.00
- TOTAL (USD, excl. flights): $3,344.20

SUMMARY OF ngorongoro-conservation-area-tariffs.pdf (Official NCAA Tariff Schedule)

A: ENTRY PERMIT (per person, 24 hours, single entry):
- Non-East African Citizen: age 16+ = $70.80, age 5–16 = $23.60, under 5 = free
- Tanzanian/East African Citizen (TZS): adult = TZS 11,800, child 5–16 = TZS 2,360, under 5 = free
- Expatriates/Residents (USD): adult = $35.40, child 5–16 = $11.80, under 5 = free
- Safari crew (Tanzanian with valid IDs): TZS 1,770

B: MOTOR VEHICLE PERMIT (per trip):
- Tare weight up to 2,000kg: private TZS 236,000 / commercial TZS 118,000
- 2,001–3,000kg: private TZS 295,000 / commercial TZS 177,000
- 3,001–7,000kg: private TZS 354,000 / commercial N/A
- 7,001kg+: private TZS 413,000 / commercial N/A
- Foreign registered vehicle (USD): up to 2,000kg = $47.20; 2,001–3,000kg = $177.00; 3,001–7,000kg = $236.00; 7,001kg+ = $354.00

C: ENTRY TO CULTURAL BOMAS: $20.00 per vehicle

D: CAMPING FEES (per person per day):
- Non-EA citizen: age 16+ = $35.40, age 5–16 = $11.80, under 5 = free
- Tanzanian citizen (TZS): adult = TZS 11,800, child 5–16 = TZS 5,900, under 5 = free
- East African citizen (TZS): adult = TZS 11,800, child 5–16 = TZS 5,900, under 5 = free
- Safari crew (Tanzanian): TZS 2,300
- Public campsite non-EA: age 16+ = $70.80, age 5–16 = $35.40, under 5 = free
- Public campsite Tanzanian (TZS): adult = TZS 17,700, child 5–16 = TZS 8,850, under 5 = free
- Public campsite East African (TZS): adult = TZS 17,000, child 5–16 = TZS 8,850, under 5 = free
- Public campsite safari crew (Tanzanian): TZS 4,720
- Special campsite (per person): Tanzanian = TZS 29,500, East African = TZS 29,500, Non-EA = $23.60

E: CRATER SERVICE FEE (per person, single entry):
- Non-EA citizen: adult = $70.80, age 5–16 = $35.40, under 5 = free
- Tanzanian (TZS): adult = TZS 17,700, child 5–16 = TZS 8,850, under 5 = free
- East African (TZS): adult = TZS 17,000, child 5–16 = TZS 8,850, under 5 = free
- Safari crew (Tanzanian): TZS 4,720
- Non-EA vehicle descent fee: $295.00 per vehicle/trip
- East African/Tanzanian vehicle descent fee: TZS 11,800 per vehicle/trip

F: WALKING SAFARI GUIDE FEES (children 12–16 only): per person, TZS 29,500 (Tanzanian/East African), $23.60 (non-EA)

G: BUSH LUNCH PERMIT (hot lunch served in crater or elsewhere):
- Non-EA citizen: adult short walk (1-4hr) = $23.60; child short walk = $11.80; adult long walk (>4hr) = $29.50; child long walk = $17.70
- Tanzanian citizen (TZS): short walk adult = TZS 11,800, child = TZS 5,900; long walk adult = TZS 23,600, child = TZS 11,800
- East African citizen (TZS): short walk adult = TZS 11,800, child = TZS 5,900; long walk adult = TZS 23,600, child = TZS 11,800

H: AIRCRAFT LANDING FEES (per landing):
- Locally registered: up to 4 seats = TZS 11,800 (private) / TZS 17,700 (commercial); 5–12 seats = TZS 17,700 / TZS 23,600; 13–20 seats = TZS 23,600 / TZS 41,300; over 20 seats = TZS 59,000 / TZS 70,800
- Foreign registered (USD): up to 4 seats = $59.00 / $141.60; 5–12 seats = $141.60 / $200.60; 13–20 seats = $200.60 / $377.60; over 20 seats = N/A
- Annual parking fee (Ngorongoro residents): all motor vehicles = TZS 236,000; all aircraft = TZS 236,000
- Motor vehicle/aircraft accidents fee: $20.00

I: OLDUVAI GORGE / SHIFTING SAND / LAETOLI FOOTPRINTS (per person):
- Non-EA citizen: age 16+ = $35.40, age 5–16 = $11.80, under 5 = free
- East African (TZS): adult = TZS 5,900, child 5–16 = TZS 1,180, under 5 = free
- Non-EA Olduvai/Shifting Sand/Laetoli Footprints (USD): adult = $11.80 (non-EA citizens not listed for Olduvai in TZS)

J: HOT AIR BALLOON SAFARIS (per person):
- Non-EA: age 16+ = $39.53, children below 8 = not listed (age 8+ = $39.53)
- East African (TZS): TZS 47,200

K: HORSE RIDING SAFARIS (per person):
- Non-EA: age 16+ = $17.70, children below 16 = not listed (presumed N/A for non-EA children)
- East African (TZS): adult = TZS 11,800

L: MOUNTAIN BIKING (per person):
- Non-EA: age 16+ = $5.90, age 5–16 = $2.36, under 5 = free
- East African (TZS): adult = TZS 5,900, child 5–16 = TZS 2,360, under 5 = free

M: SUNDOWN FEE (per person):
- Non-EA: age 16+ = $59.00, age 5–16 = $11.80, under 5 = free
- East African (TZS): adult = TZS 35,400, child 5–16 = TZS 11,800, under 5 = free

N: CONCESSION FEE (Lodges and permanent tented camps): listed but no explicit rate table — implied by structure only.

O: FILMING/PHOTOGRAPHIC FEES:
- Every filming crew member (director, producer, cameramen, soundmen, lighting): $354.00 per day (covers entry, camping, guiding, and filming but excludes crater service fee and aircraft/motor vehicle fees). NCAA receives a free copy of each film plus master tape for commercial films.

P: PENALTIES AND FINES:
- Over speeding: TZS 118,000 per vehicle
- Fraud: normal fee plus 100% penalty fine
- Off-road driving, wrong parking, other prohibited actions: TZS 118,000

VISITOR GUIDELINES (key rules):
- Permit valid for one entry within 24 hours only
- Tariffs subject to change without prior notice
- All vehicles operating within NCA must be registered company vehicles with valid TALA license (Tourism Act No. 29, 2008) — except private and government vehicles
- Only 4×4 vehicles up to 3,500kg tare weight allowed on Ngorongoro Crater floor (except authorized trucks for organized groups)
- Security checks at entry points and inside NCA
- Off-road driving prohibited unless authorized by Conservation Commissioner
- Speed limits: 50kph in the area, 25kph in the crater
- Crater descent gates close at 16:00, gates close at 18:00
- Driving permitted 06:00–18:00; beyond those hours requires permission (except late driving to designated points)
- Maximum 5 vehicles around a kill or animal sighting; silence must be maintained
- Keep at least 25 meters safe distance from animals
- Plastic bags are NOT allowed in the Ngorongoro Conservation Area
- Picnicking at designated public areas is free; special picnic areas must be reserved and paid in advance
- Entry and camping fees must be paid within 24 hours of entry
- Camping only in designated areas; special campsites must be reserved and confirmed prior to arrival
- No vehicle other than designated parking area may enter or park on camping lawn
- Visitors must remain in vehicles at all times except in designated areas
- Walking safari must be accompanied by NCAA armed ranger
- Licensed guide or official NCAA guide must accompany all crater visitors
- Domestic pets forbidden
- Photographing locals prohibited except in designated Cultural Bomas
- No picking/cutting/destroying vegetation, no removing biological or cultural heritage objects, no firewood collection
- No fires; when camping, extinguish fires carefully
- No litter; cigarette packets, lunch boxes, tissues must stay in vehicle for later disposal
- NCAA not liable for damage or loss of property or life
- Do not harass/disturb wildlife; no feeding animals; no throwing objects; no noise/imitation of animal sounds; no clapping/pounding on vehicle or sounding horn; turn off radios/audio players

CONTACTS:
- Ngorongoro Information Office: +255 734 160 014 / +255 734 160 015
- Karatu Information Office: +255 27 253 4068
- Email: cc@ncaa.go.tz
- Web: www.ncaa.go.tz
- Conservation Commissioner, NCAA, P.O. Box 1, Ngorongoro Crater, Arusha, Tanzania
- Hotline: +255 27 253 7046
- Fax: +255 27 253 7007"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"success","title":"Sheet Specialist Response (Spreadsheet)"},"children":["## Comprehensive Summary of Tanzania Trip 2026

### FILE 1: tanzaniamemories.md — Trip Plan & Context
- **Travelers:** Vasileios Kefallinos + Athina Mari
- **Dates:** August 3–20, 2026 (18 days)
- **Destinations:** Cairo (Egypt) → Arusha → Northern Safari Circuit (Tarangire, Lake Manyara, Ngorongoro) → Zanzibar → Dar es Salaam → Cairo
- **Flights (6 legs, 2 pax):** ~€2,707 total. Aegean (ATH↔CAI), EgyptAir (CAI↔DAR), Precision Air (DAR→ARK, ARK→ZNZ).
- **8 accommodations confirmed:** Eileen Hotel (Cairo), Serengeti Villa (Arusha), Twiga Camp Site + Jevas Hotel (safari), Kutoka Lodge (Arusha), Treasures of Zanzibar House (Stone Town), Ayla Beach House (Kiwengwa), Sunny Shore B&B (Dar), Ramses Hilton (Cairo).
- **Safari:** Suricata Safaris Ltd, 3-day group camping, Aug 7–9. $1,200 total ($240 deposit paid, $960 cash due on arrival).
- **The Rock Restaurant, Zanzibar:** Aug 15, 18:00–20:00, $46 fully paid.
- **Visas/Insurance:** Tanzania e-visa $50/pp, Egypt multi-entry e-visa $65/pp, Zanzibar mandatory insurance (ZIC) $44/pp.
- **Zanzibar driving:** International Driving Permit + local Zanzibar permit (~$15).

---

### FILE 2: trip-costs.xlsx — Budget Breakdown

#### Sheet "legs" (8 legs, 17 nights, all costs in USD)

| Leg | Dates | Nights | Lodging | Cost |
|-----|-------|--------|---------|------|
| Cairo (arrival stopover) | Aug 3–5 | 2 | Eileen Hotel | $102 |
| Arusha (pre-safari) | Aug 5–7 | 2 | Serengeti Villa | $62 |
| Safari circuit — Tarangire / Lake Manyara / Ngorongoro | Aug 7–9 | 2 | Suricata Safaris (Twiga camps + Jevas Hotel) | $1,200 |
| Arusha (post-safari) | Aug 9–11 | 2 | Kutoka Lodge | $96 |
| Zanzibar — Stone Town | Aug 11–13 | 2 | Treasures of Zanzibar House | $100 |
| Zanzibar — beach (Kiwengwa) | Aug 13–17 | 4 | Ayla Beach House | $304 |
| Dar es Salaam | Aug 17–19 | 2 | Sunny Shore B&B | $200 |
| Cairo (departure stopover) | Aug 19–20 | 1 | Ramses Hilton | $87 |

**Total nights: 17** | **Lodging subtotal (excl. safari package): $951**

#### Sheet "costs" (flights in EUR, everything else USD)

**By category:**

- **Flights (EUR):** €2,707 — all 6 legs for both travelers
- **Safari (USD):** $1,200 ($240 deposit paid, $960 balance due in cash)
- **Dining (USD):** $46 — The Rock Restaurant, fully paid
- **Transport (USD):** $15 — Zanzibar local driving permit
- **Visas (USD):** $100 Tanzania ($50 × 2) + $130 Egypt ($65 × 2) = $230
- **Insurance (USD):** $88 — Zanzibar mandatory (ZIC, $44 × 2)
- **Park fees (USD):** $814.20 total breakdown:
  - Ngorongoro entry permit (2 pax × $70.80): $141.60
  - Ngorongoro crater service fee (2 pax × $70.80): $141.60
  - Ngorongoro crater vehicle descent fee (per vehicle): $295.00
  - Tarangire NP entrance (2 pax × $59): $118.00
  - Lake Manyara NP entrance (2 pax × $59): $118.00
- **Lodging (USD):** $951 (from legs sheet, excl. safari-included lodging)

**TOTAL (USD, excl. flights): $3,344.20**

---

### FILE 3: ngorongoro-conservation-area-tariffs.pdf — Official NCAA Tariffs

This is the official Ngorongoro Conservation Area Authority rate card. Key rates for **non-East African citizens** (which apply to Vasilis & Athina):

- **Entry Permit:** $70.80/adult (16+), $23.60/child (5–16), free under 5
- **Motor Vehicle Permit:** $47.20 (up to 2000kg foreign registered), $177 (2001–3000kg), $236 (3001–7000kg), $354 (7001kg+)
- **Crater Service Fee:** $70.80/adult, $35.40/child
- **Vehicle Descent Fee (crater):** $295.00/vehicle/trip (non-EA citizen)
- **Camping — Public Campsite:** $35.40/adult, $11.80/child
- **Camping — Special Campsite:** $70.80/adult, $35.40/child
- **Walking Safari:** $23.60/adult (short, 1–4hrs), $29.50/adult (long, >4hrs)
- **Olduvai Gorge / Shifting Sand / Laetoli Footprints:** $35.40/adult
- **Cultural Boma entry:** $20.00/vehicle
- **Hot Air Balloon:** $39.53/person (8+ yrs)
- **Sundown Fee:** $59.00/adult
- **Horse Riding:** $35.40/adult
- **Mountain Biking:** $17.70/adult
- **Filming:** $354.00/person/day

The costs sheet line items for Ngorongoro ($141.60 entry, $141.60 crater service, $295 vehicle descent) are consistent with these official tariffs: 2 adults × $70.80 = $141.60, and $295 is the non-EA vehicle descent fee.

---

### Cross-Reference Summary
The trip-costs.xlsx spreadsheet captures all financial line items; the memoirs document provides the narrative plan, confirmed bookings, and contact details; the NCAA tariffs PDF validates the park-fee line items. Total trip cost is approximately **€2,707 (flights) + $3,344.20 (all other costs)** for two travelers over 18 days / 17 nights, covering 3 countries, 6 flights, 8 lodgings, a 3-day safari, 3 national parks + Ngorongoro Crater, visas, insurance, and one confirmed dining reservation."]}]}
